docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AFSHARTABAR, MOHSEN AS TO DEFENDANT EMIRATES WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS EMIRATES AIRLINES

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MOHSEN AFSHARTABAR OR EMIRATES AIRLINES. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
